primary_purpose: Defines core runtime state structures and functions managing processing, rendering, input and sound within TIC-80 engine core.

key_structures.name: tic_sound_register_data
key_structures.description: Represents a single sound register value over time including timing, phase and amplitude information for synthesis pipeline.

key_structures.name: tic_channel_data
key_structures.description: Holds playback state for an individual audio channel including note, position, volume and duration information.

key_structures.name: tic_command_data
key_structures.description: Aggregates various per-channel music command runtime states like chord, vibrato, slide, fine-pitch and delay.

key_structures.name: tic_jump_command
key_structures.description: Keeps track of jump target (FRAME/BEAT) used by music pattern commands.

key_structures.name: tic_core_state_data
key_structures.description: Mutable state snapshot for one runtime tick—input, channel info, music playback state, clip rect, vbank, ring-buffers, etc.

key_structures.name: tic_core
key_structures.description: Top-level object representing a running TIC-80 virtual console instance. Embeds tic_mem plus audio blip buffers, VM, samplerate and API dispatch table.

public_api.name: tic_core_tick_io
public_api.purpose: Process input state and IO before main tick logic.

public_api.name: tic_core_sound_tick_start
public_api.purpose: Prepare sound synthesis buffers at start of frame.

public_api.name: tic_core_sound_tick_end
public_api.purpose: Flush synthesized sound data at end of frame.

memory_regions.name: tic_mem memory
memory_regions.purpose: Complete console RAM containing VRAM, audio, map, sprite and user data.

memory_regions.name: sound_ringbuf
memory_regions.purpose: Double-buffered audio register history for late audio mixing.

notes: `tic_core` encapsulates most runtime responsibilities. Mapping to Swift will likely become the heart of the SpriteKit-backed emulator. Ensure careful translation of nested mutable structs and bitfield layouts; consider Swift `struct` plus helper classes for audio ring-buffer to match mutability semantics.
